storyInfo: Sakiko wakes from a strange dream and discusses it with Vigna. They go on a field mission together, and meet Iris and Bena from the Castle of Dreams. Sakiko learns from Iris that they are on a mission to use the Castle's 'sweet dreams' to rescue Iris's pen pal.

attributes.content: Today's masquerade is another huge success!
attributes.name: Nyamu Yūtenji

attributes.content: Did you hear how loud they were cheering for the encore? I bet that one kid was a total Nyamuchi fan!
attributes.name: Nyamu Yūtenji

attributes.content: Like, her eyes were glittering like crazy when I came on stage! Man, that makes me happy.
attributes.name: Nyamu Yūtenji

attributes.content: We should add a little more fan interaction to our next show, whaddaya say?
attributes.name: Nyamu Yūtenji

attributes.content: It's one thing to think of ways to increase appeal, Yūtenji-san, but do not lose sight of Ave{@nbs}Mujica's worldview.
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: Bleeeh... What, you afraid I'll steal the whole audience away?
attributes.name: Nyamu Yūtenji

attributes.content: My fans are just here to soak up Ave{@nbs}Mujica's masquerades. Why not hook them on Mujica itself?
attributes.name: Nyamu Yūtenji

attributes.content: Your very posture is a part of the performance. We must not let our guards down until the curtains have truly fallen.
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: It is our mission to see our guests enraptured in this masquerade.
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: We must therefore present a convincing image—
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: Alright, alright.
attributes.name: Nyamu Yūtenji

attributes.content: Saaay, Muuko, didn't you get the biggest cheers when you took the stage?
attributes.name: Nyamu Yūtenji

attributes.content: You were happy, weren't you? You wanted even more fans, didn't you? Be honest.
attributes.name: Nyamu Yūtenji

attributes.content: I... don't...
attributes.name: Mutsumi Wakaba

attributes.content: Stop trying to incite Mutsumi, please.
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: Haha... come on, no arguing...
attributes.name: Uika Misumi

attributes.content: I just think everyone's looking forward to the next performance—
attributes.name: Nyamu Yūtenji

attributes.content: We've got so many people on our side right now. Here's our chance to repay them by giving our all.
attributes.name: Nyamu Yūtenji

attributes.content: Saki-chan's doing her best to compose the new song. The light in the loft's been on so late these past few days...
attributes.name: Uika Misumi

attributes.content: Be assured that in the face of all your efforts, I can hardly rest on my own laurels.
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: Saki-chan...
attributes.name: Uika Misumi

attributes.content: Sakiko, real talk. Remember to chill out a little.
attributes.name: Nyamu Yūtenji

attributes.content: We all get what you're putting into this, Saki-chan. I'll make sure the lyrics are worthy of the new song.
attributes.name: Uika Misumi

attributes.content: Togawa-san played me a sample before the show. It's a good song.
attributes.name: Umiri Yahata

attributes.content: Well, if I had to say, maybe... the tempo could be a tiny bit slower?
attributes.name: Uika Misumi

attributes.content: Huh?! You all heard it already? When??
attributes.name: Nyamu Yūtenji

attributes.content: Just before the show today. I think you weren't in the dressing room?
attributes.name: Uika Misumi

attributes.content: I wanted to get the opinions of everyone, but time was short, so I simply played it for those present.
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: Nyamu made me go on her livestream as a guest... I didn't get to hear it.
attributes.name: Mutsumi Wakaba

attributes.content: Guh...!
attributes.name: Nyamu Yūtenji

attributes.content: What?!
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: Yūtenji, didn't I say not to—
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: L-Look, the light's turning green! We can talk about this on the other side!
attributes.name: Nyamu Yūtenji

attributes.content: *sigh* What a headache...
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: ...It's so wonderful.
attributes.name: Uika Misumi

attributes.content: Hm? What's this all of a sudden?
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: I was touched by what you were saying just now.
attributes.name: Uika Misumi

attributes.content: Even after all we went through, even though we've fought, the five of us are still together as a band... It's so wonderful.
attributes.name: Uika Misumi

attributes.content: I've never asked them, but I'm sure everyone thinks that way... I know I do.
attributes.name: Uika Misumi

attributes.content: As for me, I'm so glad you can put your trust in me this way, Saki-chan.
attributes.name: Uika Misumi

attributes.content: I could offer my whole life to Mujica, I really could!
attributes.name: Uika Misumi

attributes.content: Sakiko follows Uika's gaze. A group of girls are merrily crossing the road.
They are unburdened, free of cares, as if this were all a beautiful fairy tale.
Though none say it out loud, they all owe a debt of gratitude to their Saki-chan. In Nyamu's own words, Mujica made her dreams come true.
attributes.name: Uika Misumi

attributes.content: A dream...
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: It's like how everything used to be... It's almost like we're dreaming.
attributes.name: Uika Misumi

attributes.content: Huh...
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: ...Dreaming?
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: Come on, you two, let's not do this here...
attributes.name: Uika Misumi

attributes.content: Are you telling me to cast aside our identity as a band?!
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: Well, band or not, I don't care.
attributes.name: Nyamu Yūtenji

attributes.content: What?!
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: I mean, is there any reason we have to be a band for this?
attributes.name: Nyamu Yūtenji

attributes.content: What in the world are—
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: Besides, I don't hear Muuko complaining. Hell, she's the one who said 'it won't last' on TV.
attributes.name: Nyamu Yūtenji

attributes.content: Never mind being a band, I don't think she'd lose too much sleep over leaving Mujica.
attributes.name: Nyamu Yūtenji

attributes.content: That was—
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: ...I won't let Mujica disband.
attributes.name: Uika Misumi

attributes.content: Where'd you get that from? I didn't say anything about disbanding.
attributes.name: Nyamu Yūtenji

attributes.content: A member leaving is the same as us disbanding. And it's a betrayal of our fans' support.
attributes.name: Uika Misumi

attributes.content: And what I'm saying is, we've already betrayed it just now. Besides, you talk a big show for someone too damn busy to show up to practice, don't you?
attributes.name: Nyamu Yūtenji

attributes.content: That's just irresponsible, isn't it?
attributes.name: Nyamu Yūtenji

attributes.content: How could you...!
attributes.name: Uika Misumi

attributes.content: If we're dealing in responsibility here, then I'd like to say you're the one who needs more practice, Yūtenji-san!
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: I've never felt Yūtenji-san to be lacking in practice. Togawa-san, aren't you the one not paying attention to your band members here?
attributes.name: Umiri Yahata

attributes.content: Uika increases her pace to catch up with the other members who have gone ahead, but Sakiko lags dazedly behind the crowd.
She stares blankly at the flashing signal. Her legs feel as though they've been filled with lead. She can't put a single step forward.
Hey! What are you standing there for?
attributes.name: Nyamu Yūtenji

attributes.content: Did you leave something behind?
attributes.name: Umiri Yahata

attributes.content: ...Saki. The light's turning red.
attributes.name: Mutsumi Wakaba

attributes.content: Saki-chan?
attributes.name: Uika Misumi

attributes.text: 'You should go back, Saki-chan. Better you never saw me again...'

attributes.content: We're not gonna wait for you if you don't keep up!
attributes.name: Nyamu Yūtenji

attributes.content: The traffic signal beeps its urgent warning. Sakiko tries to follow, but the light has turned red.
Car after car flies past. Sakiko lifts the wind-frayed tips of her hair. The traffic light highlights her face in silhouette.
Something falls into her palm.
Is this... rain?
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: Raindrops plummet from the sky, faster, heavier.
A torrent of memories comes rushing back—
The sound around her amplifies. The noise of the crowd and the horns of cars batter her eardrums.
Rain soaks into her clothes, becoming one with her tears.
Her sorrow and helplessness cannot be told, yet the way she cries towards the sky tells all.
Melancholy and despair sweep over her, and her vision grows blurry along with the memories.
Clank, clunk.
Sakiko? Sakiko!
Mm... hmm?
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: Time to get up, sleepyhead! It's a beautiful day.
M... Miss Vigna? Am I dreaming...?
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: Nope.
attributes.name: Vigna

attributes.content: Excuse me, don't pinch my face!
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: I'm not pinching that hard. Just doing the check for you.
attributes.name: Vigna

attributes.content: (Pinches own face) See? Not that bad.
attributes.name: Vigna

attributes.content: You're not the one getting face-pinched without warning first thing in the morning!
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: Alright, alright, I'll lay off. Go get yourself ready; I'll wait for you outside.
attributes.name: Vigna

attributes.content: She presses her ear against the cool wall. The whir of the mobility layer transmits through the structure of the landship.
Clank, clunk.
So that was the sound of the mobility layer...
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: What was that strange scene... and those people?
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: So let me get this straight—you dreamt about a group of people you never met?
attributes.name: Vigna

attributes.content: ...Correct. The surroundings were completely unfamiliar too.
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: Unfamiliar vehicles, unfamiliar buildings, unfamiliar clothing...
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: Could it be a movie?
attributes.name: Vigna

attributes.content: Oh, sometimes I watch documentaries before I go to bed, and then I dream about being in those places...
attributes.name: Vigna

attributes.content: But I haven't experienced anything close to this before...
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: Maybe you're just tired?
attributes.name: Vigna

attributes.content: Whislash was telling me how you always train until way late. Apparently you don't even stop until she tells you to.
attributes.name: Vigna

attributes.content: And I think I saw your name on the Engineering Department's volunteers list...
attributes.name: Vigna

attributes.content: You're still pretty new here. You've got plenty of time and plenty of chances to adjust.
attributes.name: Vigna

attributes.content: Maybe take a little vacation if you're feeling tired? Give yourself a break.
attributes.name: Vigna

attributes.content: I'm fine, I can deal with it...
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: M-Miss Sakiko! A hand, please!
attributes.name: Flustered Operator

attributes.content: The Medical Department just got a bunch of patients that we need to arrange accommodations for...
attributes.name: Flustered Operator

attributes.content: That's not meant to be Sakiko's job, is it?
attributes.name: Vigna

attributes.content: Besides, isn't this a little complicated for a rookie to handle?
attributes.name: Vigna

attributes.content: S-Sorry, but the person in charge wanted Miss Sakiko specifically...
attributes.name: Flustered Operator

attributes.content: Where are we going? Show me the way.
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: Huh?
attributes.name: Vigna

attributes.content: I've helped them out before. I'm well-acquainted with the entire workflow.
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: If they're short of hands, I will most certainly lend mine.
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: Hey...
attributes.name: Vigna

attributes.content: Vigna, I'll see you at the usual place!
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: Wait, hold—!
attributes.name: Vigna

attributes.content: Jeez. I don't remember her learning any of that...
attributes.name: Vigna

attributes.content: Fifty-three, fifty-four, fifty-five... fifty-six...
attributes.name: Vigna

attributes.content: Almost done with the stuff on this shelf. It's good to go once it's packed.
attributes.name: Vigna

attributes.content: Mrngh... It's been an hour. Where's Sakiko?
attributes.name: Vigna

attributes.content: There you are, Sakiko!
attributes.name: Vigna

attributes.content: I duly apologize, I ended up spending more time on the patients than anticipated...
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: No big. Y'know... you've only been on Rhodes a few months, right? 'Cause it feels to me like you've been a part of the place forever.
attributes.name: Vigna

attributes.content: Really? It does?
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: Everyone's like yeah, leave it to Sakiko, she'll do a good job. People are counting on you without realizing it.
attributes.name: Vigna

attributes.content: Heck, even I am. I have to keep reminding myself you're a rookie, and I can't put too much on your plate.
attributes.name: Vigna

attributes.content: I saw you sign up for the music club, but you've never gotten to attend any of our meetings...
attributes.name: Vigna

attributes.content: Vigna, it's alright.
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: I joined Rhodes Island because I wanted to help people fight Oripathy.
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: Oripathy... If I recall, that's how your mom died, isn't it?
attributes.name: Vigna

attributes.content: ...Yes.
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: Before she did, I was under the naive belief that I could live my days without worry or care.
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: ...But Terra put the lie to that beauty.
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: I watched Mother struggle against her illness until it finally took her. I've seen so much since joining Rhodes Island...
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: Sufferings plague these lands as we speak, and I still have to learn.
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: Yeah, I think I understand where you're coming from...
attributes.name: Vigna

attributes.content: Are you done on your side, Vigna?
The caravan's ready. We're just waiting on you and your batch of the supplies.
Oh, shoot! I'm on it!
attributes.name: Vigna

attributes.content: What are you packaging these supplies for? An emergency shipment?
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: There's a town nearby that needs food and medicine urgently. The route's not safe. Need us to escort.
attributes.name: Vigna

attributes.content: I'll come with you. There must be something I can help with.
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: No, you...
attributes.name: Vigna

attributes.content: Alright, alright...
attributes.name: Vigna

attributes.content: Iris. There's no need to be so nervous, and certainly no need to blame yourself.
attributes.name: Bena

attributes.content: ...I should have noticed earlier.
attributes.name: Iris

attributes.content: Even the best of us let things slip through the cracks. Besides, you only correspond through letters. It's natural you wouldn't notice.
attributes.name: Bena

attributes.content: But... but she...!
attributes.name: Iris

attributes.content: You're hyperventilating again... come now, take a deep breath. Relax.
attributes.name: Bena

attributes.content: I gave Vigna a push just now. We'll be on our way soon.
attributes.name: Bena

attributes.content: ...We have to make it there before dark.
attributes.name: Iris

attributes.content: We will.
attributes.name: Bena

attributes.content: We know what to do when we see her, we hashed it all out. Just follow that, and everything will be fine.
attributes.name: Bena

attributes.content: Sorry we're late!
attributes.name: Vigna

attributes.content: That's alright—
attributes.name: Iris

attributes.content: Not a moment too soon—driver, take us away!
attributes.name: Bena

attributes.content: The engine rumbles, and the vehicle accelerates through the passage.
Phew. I hope we still make it in time—
attributes.name: Vigna

attributes.content: Oh, we were in such a hurry, I almost forgot! Lemme introduce you girls.
attributes.name: Vigna

attributes.content: This is Sakiko, our new trainee operator. She's from Victoria, just like you guys, and she's helping me out with logistics work right now.
attributes.name: Vigna

attributes.content: Iris and Bena here are... uh... how do I put it...
attributes.name: Vigna

attributes.content: Oh, yeah! 'Fairies!'
attributes.name: Vigna

attributes.content: Er. Fairies?
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: Now now, Vigna, we can introduce ourselves. We've done this song and dance more times than we can count.
attributes.name: Bena

attributes.content: So, Miss Sakiko of Victoria, I assume you know fairytales of the Castle of Dreams?
attributes.name: Bena

attributes.content: I read some in storybooks when I was little.
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: Do you believe they're real?
attributes.name: Bena

attributes.content: Huh...?
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: Well... I did pester Mother about them plenty, at that age.
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: So you don't believe in them now.
attributes.name: Bena

attributes.content: Well, I don't mean that exactly—
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: But every fairytale is true, you know.
attributes.name: Bena

attributes.content: 'Deep in the forests of Victoria, there towers the Castle of Dreams, where fairies make their home and bring sweet dreams to every child.'
attributes.name: Bena

attributes.content: Does it really exist?
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: Say, you're not all grown-up yet, right, Sakiko? Maybe those weird dreams of yours have something to do with the fairies.
attributes.name: Vigna

attributes.content: Fairies would never barge into children's dreams without permission. It's not the done thing.
attributes.name: Iris

attributes.content: Dreams are the reflection of oneself, and the formation of thought. Doubly so for a child whose mind is still delicate.
attributes.name: Iris

attributes.content: Some dreams can change a child's entire life.
attributes.name: Iris

attributes.content: We bring sweet dreams to children, yes, but first we gain their permission. Then, we consider very carefully what the stuff of said dreams will be, and when exactly to bring them.
attributes.name: Iris

attributes.content: I have to say, the dreams I've been having are a far cry from 'sweet'... 'bewildering' is the more appropriate word.
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: You can always have Iris help you interpret your dreams. Once she's a little less busy.
attributes.name: Bena

attributes.content: Iris can? Actually, when was the last time either of you had time off?
attributes.name: Vigna

attributes.content: Sakiko never got to meet you two 'cause you spent so little time at Rhodes in the first place.
attributes.name: Vigna

attributes.content: Iris is the Master of the Castle of Dreams. There's a lot that demands her personal attention.
attributes.name: Bena

attributes.content: *sigh* It's a shame I'm not cut out for dreamspinning myself, else I could lighten some of her load.
attributes.name: Bena

attributes.content: (Mutters) Though there are others with the talent to spin dreams... but that 'child' is much too dangerous.
attributes.name: Bena

attributes.content: So is that the order of business this time as well? Bringing sweet dreams to children?
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa
Bena
attributes.content: Yes, and no...

attributes.name: Bena
attributes.content: Iris, can I tell her?
...I'll tell her myself.
attributes.name: Iris

attributes.content: One year ago, I happened across a storybook that utterly captivated me.
attributes.name: Iris

attributes.content: I wrote to the address on the title page, and became pen pals with the author. Through letters, we exchanged fairytale interpretations and imaginations with one another.
attributes.name: Iris

attributes.content: But more recently, her replies began to dwindle. It had been a while since I'd seen her message, too.
attributes.name: Iris

attributes.content: Then two days ago, I got a letter from her. And inside was a brand‑new story she had written.
attributes.name: Iris

attributes.content: The protagonist girl has a quick-tempered father, and she finds herself isolated among children her own age...
attributes.name: Iris

attributes.content: It was the complete opposite of all her previous stories, and she told me... this was what her life was really like.
attributes.name: Iris

attributes.content: In closing, on the cusp of adulthood, she mentioned her birthday—the date is... tomorrow.
attributes.name: Iris

attributes.content: She wasn't even an adult yet?! Jeez...
attributes.name: Vigna

attributes.content: And the single line at the end of the letter keeps haunting me...
attributes.name: Iris

attributes.content: She said she didn't want to grow up...
attributes.name: Iris

attributes.content: 'This will be my final letter.'
...Less than twelve hours until the day turns over.
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: Yes. That's why Iris is in such a rush. We must hurry to the town, and find—
attributes.name: Bena

attributes.content: What was that?!
attributes.name: Vigna

attributes.content: We just burst a tire. The roads here are shot...
attributes.name: Driver

attributes.content: ...What?!
attributes.name: Iris

attributes.content: Under the blazing sun, waves of scorching heat sink through the skin.
This is going to be a very long wait.
